hero.title: Parker Analog Lab
hero.subtitle: Explore the Infinite Possibilities of Angular and Analog
hero.description: An experimental project powered by Analog 2.x, integrating the latest Angular Signals to demonstrate modern frontend-backend connections and UI implementations.

header.title: Custom Components
header.subtitle: Explore custom components and third-party integrations built with Angular 17+ Signals, covering use cases for UI, forms, layouts, and native APIs.

filter.label: Filter by category:
filter.empty: No components found in this category, please try another one.

dialogModal.title: Dialog Modal
dialogModal.desc: Dialog component supporting animation toggles, Esc key to close, and background overlay, based on Angular Signal state management.

toast.title: Toast Notification
toast.desc: Stacked notification component supporting success, error, warning, and info types with auto-dismiss timers.

dropdown.title: Dropdown Menu
dropdown.desc: Keyboard-operable dropdown menu supporting grouped options, icons, disabled states, and ARIA accessibility guidelines.

imageUpload.title: Image Upload
imageUpload.desc: Drag-and-drop upload component integrating previews, progress bars, file format validation, and multi-file queue uploads.

formValidator.title: Form Validator
formValidator.desc: Custom validator collection based on Angular Reactive Forms, including email, national ID, mobile numbers, and other common formats in Taiwan.

scrollFetch.title: ScrollFetch
scrollFetch.desc: Highly integrated component supporting Pull-to-refresh and Infinite Scroll.

resizablePanel.title: Resizable Panel
resizablePanel.desc: Draggable resizable split panel component, suitable for dual-pane layouts like code editors and file managers.

clipboardCopy.title: Clipboard Copy
clipboardCopy.desc: One-click copy component integrating the Clipboard API, featuring successful copy animation feedback and fallback support.

geolocation.title: Geolocation
geolocation.desc: Geolocation component based on Geolocation API, integrating reverse geocoding to display user location information.
